div.p: Unlock the full potential of Odoo with our strategic consulting—covering requirement analysis, workflow design, and optimization guidance.

div.h2: Expert Odoo Consulting Services That Drive Real Growth

div.p: Stop guessing with your ERP. Creyox Technologies brings certified Odoo consultants who map your business reality to Odoo's full potential, cutting inefficiencies, eliminating silos, and building a system your team actually uses.

Odoo is one of the most capable business management platforms available today. But capability alone doesn't create results. Businesses that implement Odoo without proper consulting routinely face the same problems: modules that don't match actual workflows, data nobody trusts, and teams that resist the system.

Odoo consulting is the strategic layer that prevents all of this. It begins with understanding your business, how your teams actually work today, where the bottlenecks are, and what a successful ERP outcome means specifically for your organisation.

section.style: padding: 120px 0 !important; background: radial-gradient(circle at top right, #f8faff, #ffffff) !important;

div.p: Odoo consulting is a strategic advisory service that bridges the gap between your business processes and Odoo ERP's capabilities. It's not just about getting Odoo up and running, it's about ensuring every module, workflow, and automation is built to serve your specific operational goals.

At Creyox Technologies, our Odoo consultation begins with understanding your business, your pain points, growth ambitions, team dynamics, and current inefficiencies. Only then do we design an Odoo architecture that actually fits.

div.class: partner-image-box border-0 bg-transparent d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center p-0

div.style: background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(67, 97, 238, 0.1) 0%, transparent 70%); width: 140%; height: 140%; position: absolute; top: -20%; left: -20%; z-index: -1;

img.style: max-height: 520px; width: auto; object-fit: contain; border-radius: 40px;

div.p: We map how your business actually works. Workshops with your team surface real bottlenecks where Odoo delivers most value.
A phased plan built around your priorities. Quick wins first, full rollout second with clear milestones.
We compare requirements against Odoo's capabilities. You know upfront what's standard and what needs dev.
Odoo has 80+ modules. We recommend only what you genuinely need, reducing cost and complexity.

div.style: background: none !important; border: none !important; box-shadow: none !important; padding: 20px 0 !important;

div.p: Moving from Tally, SAP, Zoho, Microsoft Dynamics, or a legacy system? We manage data audit, field mapping, validation, and cutover end to end.
Inventory your current data and identify what needs cleaning before migration begins.
Every data entity mapped to its Odoo equivalent. Transformation logic designed for custom matches.
Scripts tested in a staging environment before anything touches your live system.
A zero-surprise go-live with rollback provisions and parallel-run periods for safety.
We don't just digitise your current process—we redesign it. Approval workflows and auto-triggers that save hours weekly.
Role-specific training that makes adoption stick. We build internal champions to keep your team confident.
Already on Odoo but not getting full value? We audit configuration and data quality to deliver a prioritised fix list.
The bridge between your operations and the platform. They translate requirements into configurations without losing business intent.
They work at the intersection of requirements and engineering, translating specifications into technically sound, maintainable code.
Advising at the strategic level on how Odoo fits within your broader digital transformation journey.
Design and build the connectors that eliminate data silos across your technology stack cleanly.
Specialises in the critical phase between "solution designed" and "system live" where projects face highest risk.
Bridge between a business requirement and a development brief, preventing expensive customization mistakes.
We understand your business and give you an honest assessment.
Workshops with your team. Every pain point is documented.
What Odoo does natively, what needs config, what needs development.
You approve the full plan before any work begins.
Weekly updates, live issue tracking, full visibility.
Role-based training before go-live. On-call support during cutover.
30-60-90 day reviews. Proactive guidance as your business evolves.
Our team holds official Odoo certifications across functional, technical, and business domains.
From first consulting call to post-launch support, we cover development, integration, and migration.
We don't recommend features that solve business problems. Recommendations tied to outcomes.
No hidden scope, no billing surprises. Fixed-scope or T&M engagements with full visibility.
Implemented Odoo for manufacturers, retail, logistics, and service businesses globally.

div.h2: Odoo ERP Consulting Across Every Industry
div.p: Our experience spans diverse sectors each with unique compliance and operational needs.
BOM, MRP, work orders, quality control.
POS, inventory sync, multi-channel sales.
Fleet management, route optimization.
Patient records, scheduling, billing.
Project costing, asset tracking.
Timesheets, billing, resource planning.
Student management, fee collection.
Lot traceability, expiry tracking.

div.h2: Not Sure Where to Start with Odoo?
div.p: Book an Odoo consultation with our senior consultant. We'll review your current processes, identify your biggest quick wins, and give you an honest assessment, no pressure, no sales pitch.
